sourceMovie.title: The Fog
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Fog for the same reason it broke through in 1980: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a horror rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. John Carpenter keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Bird Box
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Fog clicked for you, Bird Box (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Fog?
faq.answer: Try Bird Box, The Exorcist, The Others—each shares DNA with The Fog while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Fog?
faq.answer: The Fog (1980) is best described as Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Fog worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
